name: scribe
description: Claude as your scribe — reads what you read, writes it down, keeps it linked, never forgets. Persistent, interlinked Obsidian markdown wiki maintained by Claude. Implementation of Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as Claude Code skills + commands.

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Five skills + slash commands for wiki bootstrap, ingest, query, lint, and per-page updates. Default vault at ~/Documents/obsidian/claude/.
